Slot: BACK
AC: 8
STR: +4 DEX: +4 HP: +50
WT: 0.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Slot: BACK
AC: 8
STR: +4 DEX: +4 HP: +50
WT: 0.0 Size: SMALL

# Mar 31 2003 at 6:58 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758578638
189 posts
On my server (Torvonnilous). These range about 300-500pp in the bazaar... I looked them up and they were the only 2 in the bazaar... one was 300 the other 500... Dont know why so cheap.. I would pay probably 1k at the most for this... Its nice! Its a good upgrade from my old cape anyways =P Icetooth pelt...

I bought this for my 31st lvl Bard since her hp are kinda low..With her I concentrated more on the dex, cha. Since I do charm alot..So this will definately help out in the HP area :)
▲ Page top
WTB!!!!
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2002 at 4:56 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780632917
203 posts
looking to buy one of these on Ayonae Ro, send me a tell ingame, as Garll or Kanvarwen
▲ Page top
rangers
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2002 at 12:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966206925
29 posts
Im thinking this might be nice for my ranger. The HP and STR are very welcome to any ranger. As for monks, my main is a monk, and he has spider fur. I think they two are too close to trade them for one another. Spider fur has 2 more AC which is no joke, and 3 STM. My monk would take 3 STM before 4 DEX anyday. STR both match. Comes down to 10 SVC + 2AC vs. 50HPS. Obviously the 50 HPS own both by far, but is it really worth that much more money? if you can get spider fur for a lot cheaper, then thats what i suggest thats what you do. Nowadays you can see spider fur cloaks around 200pp, and Shimmering will run you between 500-1k. BTW 0.0 weight = awesome for any class.

Eamonn Foxfists 54 Monk
DracoFox 18 Ranger

Edited, Mon Dec 16 08:01:33 2002
▲ Page top
RE: rangers
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2002 at 8:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255011925
Scholar
45 posts
50HP > 2AC any day of the week, regardless of class. Shimmering Terror Hide Cloak is better than a Spider Fur Cloak by a decent margin.

However, you did mention price, and the price difference is something to keep in mind if you are strapped for cash. Shimmering Terror Hide tends to go for about double what a Spider Fur Cloak does. If you are lacking cash, Spider Fur Cloak is excellent, but if you can afford the price difference, Shimmering Terror Hide Cloak is much better.
▲ Page top

omg, I bought one of these for 180pp(not a typo) on EMarr in the Bazaar, either the person selling it didn't know how much is was worth, or he was just feeling generous. Anonymous
This cloak is nice for everyone. I use one and I'm a SK. There just simply aren't that many cloaks that are better than the lizardscale cloak and worse than a cof that don't require 200+ tailoring skill. HBC is an example of one such rare cloak, but it seems to go for around 5k on my server, and the stats are about the same as this.

You know, the information states which zone the item is in. Why not get in a group, go there and explore instead of whinning because someone didn't say exactly which creature it dropped from and the exact spawn location with a guide on how to kill it? Sheesh

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 01 2001 at 2:34 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) because some people enjoy finding these items for themselves and like to use this site as a resource to decide what to shoot for, not a step-by-step manual on how to find it.
